headline: Keysight Debuts Purpose-Built 1.6T Ethernet AI Workload Emulation Platform to Validate Next-Generation AI Fabrics
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 10, 2026--Platform reduces risk, cost, and development time with real-world AI workload emulation and data-center-ready scalability.
